content.text: JKSSB Advt. 04/2026 Various Posts Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about JKSSB Advt. 04/2026 Various Posts Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board (JKSSB) JKSSB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 04/2026 Short Details
Notification Out : 25/05/2026 Starting Date : 22/06/2026 Last Date : 21/07/2026 11:59 PM
Unreserved : 600/- SC / ST / EWS : 500/- PH (Divyang) : 500/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 18-40 Years Age Limit as on : 01/01/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Medical Examination Document Verification

Boiler Mechanic : Three year diploma in Mechanical Engineering from recognized institute Senior Horticulture Technician : B.Sc. Horticulture or B.Sc. Agriculture with Horticulture as major subject Incubator Mechanic : Three year diploma in Mechanical Engineering Refrigerator Mechanic : Three year Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering with specialization in refrigeration Electrician : Matric with ITI in relevant trade Junior Grader : Matric with Science Plumber : Middle pass with ITI in the line Copy Holder : Graduate Lathe Runner : Matric with ITI in respective trade Machineman / Assistant Machineman : Matric with ITI/Diploma in relevant trade or 7 years experience in printing field Binder (Junior Scale) : Matric with ITI/Diploma in relevant trade or 7 years experience in printing field Press Mechanic (Junior Scale) : Matric with ITI in respective trade Assistant Extension Officer : Diploma in Textile Technology Assistant Jobber : Matric with ITI Caretaker : Graduate Dyeing Instructor : Matric with ITI in Dyeing Dyeing Master : Degree/Diploma in Textile Technology Fitter : Matric with ITI in Fitter Trade Head Weaver : Matric with ITI in Weaving Loan Inspector : Commerce Graduate with Economics as one of the subjects Quality Control Supervisor : Diploma in Handloom/Wool/Wood Technology Technical Assistant : Diploma in Handloom/Wool/Wood Technology Weaver : ITI in Weaving Inspector Induscos : Commerce Graduate with diploma in Industrial Cooperative Management Supervisor Common Facility Centre : Graduate Computer Assistant : BCA or Graduate with two years Diploma in Computer Science or DOEACC O Level Library Assistant : Bachelor’s of Library Science Mistry : Matriculation with National Trade Test/ITI in relevant trade Plumber-II : Matriculation with National Trade Test/ITI in relevant trade

items: Notification Out : 25/05/2026
Starting Date : 22/06/2026

Boiler Mechanic : Three year diploma in Mechanical Engineering from recognized institute
Senior Horticulture Technician : B.Sc. Horticulture or B.Sc. Agriculture with Horticulture as major subject
Incubator Mechanic : Three year diploma in Mechanical Engineering
Refrigerator Mechanic : Three year Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering with specialization in refrigeration
Electrician : Matric with ITI in relevant trade
Junior Grader : Matric with Science
Plumber : Middle pass with ITI in the line
Copy Holder : Graduate
Lathe Runner : Matric with ITI in respective trade
Machineman / Assistant Machineman : Matric with ITI/Diploma in relevant trade or 7 years experience in printing field
Binder (Junior Scale) : Matric with ITI/Diploma in relevant trade or 7 years experience in printing field
Press Mechanic (Junior Scale) : Matric with ITI in respective trade
Assistant Extension Officer : Diploma in Textile Technology
Assistant Jobber : Matric with ITI
Caretaker : Graduate
Dyeing Instructor : Matric with ITI in Dyeing
Dyeing Master : Degree/Diploma in Textile Technology
Fitter : Matric with ITI in Fitter Trade
Head Weaver : Matric with ITI in Weaving
Loan Inspector : Commerce Graduate with Economics as one of the subjects
Quality Control Supervisor : Diploma in Handloom/Wool/Wood Technology
Technical Assistant : Diploma in Handloom/Wool/Wood Technology
Weaver : ITI in Weaving
Inspector Induscos : Commerce Graduate with diploma in Industrial Cooperative Management
Supervisor Common Facility Centre : Graduate
Computer Assistant : BCA or Graduate with two years Diploma in Computer Science or DOEACC O Level
Library Assistant : Bachelor’s of Library Science
Mistry : Matriculation with National Trade Test/ITI in relevant trade
Plumber-II : Matriculation with National Trade Test/ITI in relevant trade
